---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. _"I'm always frustrated when SchemaGuard misses X type of breaking change..."_

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Schema / file type affected

What schema type does this relate to?

- [ ] SQL migrations (Alembic, Django, Flyway, Liquibase, raw SQL)
- [ ] Pydantic models
- [ ] SQLAlchemy models
- [ ] dataclasses / TypedDict
- [ ] Avro (`.avsc`)
- [ ] Protobuf (`.proto`)
- [ ] JSON Schema
- [ ] dbt `schema.yml`
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Additional context

Add any other context, links, or examples about the feature request here.
